ksa_text: Ability to design data systems, databases, and integration mechanisms, determining data requirements and managing data flows.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of infrastructure supporting information technology (IT) for safety, performance, and reliability.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of infrastructure supporting information technology (IT) for safety, performance, and reliability.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-A-004 (TF, Ability) maps to Survey Researcher scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4407 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: onet=0.441, ddat=0.428, dcwf=0.422. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4407 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-A-004 (TF, composite 0.4407) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles does not surface this TF-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4407 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for TF domain content at composite 0.4407 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4407, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
